title: Latest F1 News

items.title: Antonelli wins Miami thriller from Norris and Piastri
items.content: Kimi Antonelli has claimed his third consecutive victory of the season at the Miami Grand Prix, holding off McLaren's Lando Norris in an eventful race.

items.title: Brown on McLaren recruiting ‘huge talent’ Lambiase
items.content: McLaren CEO Zak Brown admits that the squad took the opportunity to "strengthen our racing team" by signing Gianpiero Lambiase from Red Bull as their Chief Racing Officer.
